case_title: MATTHEW DOZIER et al VS. TRISHA CLARK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2010 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DOZIER, MATTHEW LASKAR, JEREMY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY DOZIER, MATTHEW LASKAR, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, TRISHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND CO-PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOZIER, MATTHEW LASKAR, JEREMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, TRISHA $1,041.30 PRINCIPAL, $54.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.80, **** THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFFS ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR 40% OF THE COST OF REPAINTIING BASED ON A FIVE YEAR AVERAGE LIFE FOR PAINT IN AN APARTMENT, AND THE NEED TO REPAINT DUE TO MORE THAN ORDINARY WEAR AND TEAR. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFFS ARE ENTITLED TO RETURN OF THEIR SECURITY DEPOSIT, PLUS INTEREST OF $55.80, LESS $800.00 FOR PAINT, AND LESS THE TENANT'S PORTION'S OF THE RENT BOARD FEE OF $14.50. (JUDGMENT AMOUNT REPRESENTS A NET AWARD) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED FEB-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, TRISHA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY DOZIER, MATTHEW LASKAR, JEREMY CLARK, TRISHA
